title: Rayher Metal Rings, Silver, 20 cm
features: The embroidery hoop is perfect for your DIY dream catcher and spirit wheel. Wrap The hoop with leather cord or leave it as is. When weaving the web, you can string pearls, beads or small stones to make it stand out. Add feathers and decorative trinkets for a truly unique handcrafted dreamcatcher
Ideal for macramé projects. Knot your yarn and create stunning wall hangings, plant hangers and more. Use it as handle for your homemade macramé handbag, crocheted tote and Bohemian style accessory

Use this ring as base for wreath making. Easily design A sleek and elegant wreath with only a few silk flowers and some floral wire. Attach decorative stems, colourful twigs and other natural materials to match It with your seasonal decorations

An excellent frame for all your homemade mobiles. You can mix and match different sized rings to make lovely mobiles for the nursery or kids' Room. Hang cute animal shapes, fluffy clouds or sparkling stars that make your little one smile
description: From the manufacturer Rayher Just Creative At Rayher, we have everything that sparks creativity! With the 20,000 products on offer you huge choice and excellent quality. So everyone will find the equipment and tools they need, both beginners and DIYers from Sunday to DIY as well as hand-made professionals. Looking for ideas? So you can always find inspiration for your own creations or create ideas that we sugg. With filter options you can target by theme, technique, completion time and difficulty level to find ideas and tips faster and easier. Following our motto: Being creative makes you happy.
